Michael: Mahāparinirvāṇasūtra: You indiscriminately list both Mainstream versions (T5, T6, T7) and Mahāyāna texts (T374, T375, T376); you also list various weird things (T377, T390). Mainstream and Mahāyāna versions are fundamentally different texts, if you tell your machine that they are "parallels" to Waldschmidt's Skt or DN 16, it will break (or it should). For an example of weirdness, see e.g.: https://dazangthings.nz/cbc/text/1332/
